title: Mission Control Visual Command Center
summary: Replaced Mission Control UI with unified visual command-center layout
Added live views for DAG graph, runs, queue, notifications, sessions, and tasks
Added in-UI controls for run/node actions, queue approve/dispatch, and telephony calls
Validated local and pi400 runtime smoke tests
Synced repository to openclaw@pi400 and verified remote typecheck/build
tests_run: pi400 npm install && npm run typecheck && npm run build
rollback_steps: Revert /api/dashboard route and Mission Control renderHtml changes
Revert src/index.ts build change id update
open_items: Add websocket push updates for dashboard
